name: python3-pglast
title: python3-pglast
summary: PostgreSQL Languages AST and statements prettifier (Python 3)
description:
PostgreSQL Languages AST and statements prettifier (Python 3)
This is a Python 3 module that exposes the parse tree of a PostgreSQL
statement (extracted by the almost standard PG parser repackaged as a
standalone static library by libpg_query) as set of interconnected nodes,
usually called an abstract syntax tree.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pgpp because PostgreSQL Languages AST and statements prettifier (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pgpp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pgpp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pgpp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
